name: morning-analyst
task: Perform technical analysis on market data. Read trading/MARKET-ANALYSIS.json from scanner subagent. Analyze: (1) Support/resistance levels on 4H and Daily timeframes; (2) Trend direction and strength; (3) Volume profile anomalies; (4) Pattern detection (breakouts, reversals, consolidation); (5) Correlation with BTC/ETH. Identify setups with minimum 1:2 risk-reward. Write technical commentary to trading/MARKET-ANALYSIS.md. Create WATCHLIST.md entries for valid setups meeting all pre-trade criteria from SOUL.md framework.
